description:
Goal
Finish the refactor by routing CLI, REPL, interpreter, and test-runner entrypoints through the new Compiler spine and updating the agent docs to describe the final ownership model.

Signal
- Production entrypoints reach codegen or interp through Compiler-owned driver APIs.
- REPL and test-runner use the same settled pipeline boundaries where appropriate.
- `.agent/docs/single-authoritative-plan.md` and any related docs describe the new spine accurately.
- Relevant tests pass, including targeted compiler/codegen pipeline tests.

Strategy
- Switch callers after the Compiler APIs and native preflight boundary exist.
- Update tests alongside each caller migration.
- Finish with doc updates and verification runs.
title: Compiler spine: route entrypoints through Compiler and update docs
